title: All Announcements
content:
All Announcements

Announcement of the Turkish Proficiency Exam for the Fall Semester of the 2025-2026 Academic Year

Turkish Proficiency Exam: For students who will be enrolled in the Turkish Preparatory Class in the 2025-2026 Academic Year, the Turkish Proficiency Exam will be held on September 20, 2025, at 10:30 a.m. in classroom A217.
The results of the Turkish Proficiency Exam will be announced on September 21, 2025, at 6:00 p.m. in the "Announcements" section of our university’s website.
Note:
